title: oldenlandia cephalotes
intro: Oldenlandia cephalotes, also known as the 'Eclipse Plant', is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia cephalotes include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory infections and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and can also be made into a tincture or powder for use in herbal remedies.
